focus: full spec_code and checklist_evidence replay across packet 012/008, packets 015/001/005/006, the 015 parent, and the playbook capability overlay; refine P1-001 with complete adjudication

findingDetails.title: Published SQLite opens do not enforce the manifest content digest
findingDetails.evidence: Production opens compare only the database-owned generation_hash and never invoke the manifest SHA-256 verifier.
findingDetails.scopeProof: All production query, hydration, status, and repair consumers funnel through openPublishedStyleDatabase; verifyDigests:true appears only in manifest tests.

adjudication.claim: A published SQLite artifact can be altered without changing its internal generation_hash and production opens will not compare it with the manifest sha256.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Re-read production open and verifier, searched consumers/call sites, and reran 69 database tests; optional tamper verification works but production opens do not invoke it.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Generation-named local artifacts may be operationally treated as immutable, but no in-scope read-only guarantee enforces that assumption.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Enforced immutable publication or production digest verification before rows are exposed.

findingDetails.title: Manual testing playbook uses removed pre-restructure paths
findingDetails.evidence: Mandatory scenarios and commands target nonexistent styles/_db and styles/_engine trees.
findingDetails.scopeProof: No files exist under either documented tree; relocated engine and database suites pass at styles/tests/engine and styles/tests/database.

adjudication.claim: The required manual release-readiness playbook points to removed pre-restructure paths, so its mandatory database and engine scenarios are not executable as written.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Checked for compatibility directories and found none; ran relocated suites successfully.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Paths could be historical shorthand, but the playbook explicitly requires those on-disk artifacts and commands.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: An in-scope resolver or compatibility surface makes every documented command execute unchanged.

findingDetails.title: Parent phase map reports shipped children as planned
findingDetails.evidence: The parent map and next action say 001, 005, and 006 are planned/to-build while child packets report COMPLETE or IMPLEMENTED.
findingDetails.scopeProof: All three in-scope child status surfaces contradict the parent; graph metadata has no last-active-child override.

adjudication.claim: The governing phase-parent map and resume metadata contradict the shipped states of 001, 005, and 006, making current sequence and remaining work unreliable.
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Compared parent map with each child status and checked parent graph metadata for an override; none resolves the contradiction.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: The map may be a planning snapshot, but it is presented as current governing transition/resume state without a historical qualifier.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: A named current parent authority is proven to supersede this map for resume, release, and remaining-work decisions.

traceabilityChecks.result: Child shipped/deferred behavior and test counts mostly match, but P1-001 remains active and the 015 parent contradicts shipped child states.
All checklists in the manifest were replayed; the 001 checklist is absent from the validated scope manifest.
Mandatory scenarios use removed pre-restructure paths.
No feature catalog is named in the validated manifest.

noveltyJustification: Two new P1 traceability defects were found and the active P1 was materially refined with the missing findingId adjudication field; weighted numerator 12.5 (10 new + 2.5 refinement) over 15 active severity weight.
edgeCases: 001-foundation/checklist.md is absent from the validated manifest, so its 14/15 claim remains partial rather than read out of scope.
Stale strategy reducer text marks pending core protocols BLOCKED, but the explicit iteration-003 prompt requires their replay.
Explicitly deferred sentinel, Checkpoint B, relevance, scenario-matrix, and cutover gates were not treated as defects.

fallback: direct reads, exact searches, pinned Git evidence, and executable tests

reason: Packet 006 explicitly keeps legacy and leaves cutover human-gated.
